message:
chore(beads): sync issue tracker state

Update beads issue database to reflect current implementation progress
across multiple work streams. Key state changes:

- Update existing beads with revised priorities and status transitions
- Record closure reasons for completed iconv, grp/pwd, and startup work
- Sync dependency metadata for newly wired module relationships
